title: poa crassinervis
intro: Poa crassinervis, a perennial grass species, is native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Poa crassinervis include wound healing, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial effects. It is often prepared as a tea or infused oil for topical application, and its leaves can also be used in traditional herbal preparations.
